turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I wanted to know which specialities you have at your clinic. Like departments.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure! Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic has Cardiology, Orthopaedics, Neurology, Gynaecology, Paediatrics, Dermatology, ENT, Ophthalmology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Psychiatry, Physiotherapy, and Radiology. We also have a full pathology lab.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Wow, that's quite comprehensive. Do you have a neonatal ICU?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have a NICU with 6 beds for newborn care. Our neonatologist is on call round the clock.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And do you handle high-risk pregnancies?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, our gynaecology team is experienced with high-risk pregnancies. Dr. Kavitha Reddy specialises in that area.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Very good. I'll be visiting soon. Thank you.
